caption:
🔥 Professor's Day Off: When Teaching Gets Real

I was just another girl in a tailored blazer, sipping my espresso near the faculty lounge when I spotted him. Dr. Alessandro, the hottest Italian physics professor, leaned against my desk, all tall frame and brooding charm. "You've been watching me every class," he murmured, adjusting the bow tie of my Italian-styled black blazer. 

My breath hitched as I straightened my sheer skirt and pushed my chest out against the blazer’s soft fabric, feeling that familiar heat. His touch wasn't a gentle guide, but a secret promise—slipping a note into my bra that smelled like old leather and sandalwood: *Midnight. The library server room. I'll unlock the door.*

Later, I swapped my blazer for a lace-front crop top that barely hid my cleavage under my usual black pencil skirt. The server room lights hummed, shadows framing his shirt-sleeved arms as he closed the metal door. His suit jacket gone, replaced by a silk unbuttoned shirt that clung to his wet hair, revealing the broad shoulders that made me weak.

"You dress for a fight and you show so much," he whispered, his lips brushing the fabric of my skirt where I’d pulled it tight. A low moan vibrated through the floor tiles. His fingers slipped under the lace front, teasing what the blazer was supposed to hide.

"Tonight, no classes," I panted, wrapping my arms around his neck to keep him close. "Just me, you, and the data we keep so well." The server hum echoed, mixing with the soft sounds we made against the cool metal. In my Italian-designed heels clicking out of the room, I knew we'd made waves in more than just the curriculum.

#TeacherLife #UniversitySecrets #ItalianVibes #FacultyAffairs #BlazerBabe #CurvesAndClasses #MidnightRomance #EtherealBeauty #InstaFlirting #Academia
